title: Better "Add Server"
description: Some small quality of life changes for the "add server" menu
body:
# Better Server Menu / Better "Add Server"
Very small but useful Minecraft Fabric 1.19/1.20+ mod with some small quality of life improvements for the "Add Server" menu.


> *Are you tired of having dozens of servers in your server list, all using the default name "Minecraft Server"?
> Then, this is **the** mod for You!*

![demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d4abff7e-cdbe-40df-b6ec-704b183a9215)

## Features
This mod aims to improve the usability/ comfort of the "Add Server" menu in Minecraft by:
 - saving when you press enter
 - automatically filling in the server name when you enter the IP or domain
 - even converting the names of existing servers that have the default name "Minecraft Server" to more recognisable names

### For example:
When you enter a server address like `hypixel.net`, the mod automatically generates the server name `Hypixel` by dropping the domain ending (".net") and capitalising the first letter, instead of leaving the default name "Minecraft Server".
Once you've entered the address, all you need to do is press enter to save and you're done!

Please report any issues or incompatibilities you may find on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Player005/BetterAddServer/issues).
Feel free to also post suggestions on how to improve this mod, or even to contribute code by creating a pull request.
